questions.text: Which workflow process validates the use of free goods and stock-sensitive movements?
What is required to initiate a modification of validator and threshold in SAP workflows?
options: Submitting a request directly to AMS support
Raising a ServiceNow ticket validated by the Local Internal Control Manager
Emailing the global team with the request details

questions.text: In the Return Order/Claims process, which role is involved as a validator?
Which Fiori app ID is used for the annual review of workflow validators and their thresholds?
What is the primary purpose of the Financial Credit Memo Request workflow?
options: Managing internal audit recommendations and credit validations
